scripts.build: if pwd | grep -q 'api.daipohlmann'; then npm run build:api; else npm run build:admin; fi
scripts.build:admin: cd admin && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:api: cd api && npm install --include=dev && npx nest build
scripts.start: if [ "$APP_TYPE" = "API" ]; then node api/dist/main.js; else cd admin && npx next start; fi
